sys_script_include.description:
2.7 STRY0100724 - DEV Story- Performance Improvements - Running Templates STRY0110317 - DIA: Time in Task suspense date defaults to the time when creating the Templates. Adjust the default time to the end of the day for all new Templates.
2.6 - moved duration code in here from Task Helper as this duration logic is related to template, not task
2.5 P3 STRY0084306 - TUP - STRETCH - Template form - "Template Subtask Name Setting" - None, Suffix and Prefix STRY0084419 - TUP - STRETCH - Template Instance - Template Subtask(s) Name Setting" field on Template form set to "None" STRY0084420 - TUP - STRETCH - Template Instance - Template Subtask(s) Name Setting" field on Template form set to "Suffix" STRY0084424 - TUP - STRETCH - Template Instance - Template Subtask(s) Name Setting" field on Template form set to "Prefix" STRY0085134 - TUP - Mapping fields - Template form fields must map to "Template Instance" STRY0085139 - TUP - Mapping fields - Run Template UI from Task - Template Instance fields map from the Template selected to run and the Task selected to run template from STRY0084599 - Need a way for deliver and customers to better synchronize field updates and changes
v2.5.13 STRY0075793 - run templates from task in native // STRY0074135 - the parent task for the grafted in template did not update to set the child template run // See associated fix script Tasker_2_5_13_Set_child_route_template
STRY0063867 & STRY0063859 Previously: RunProcessTemplate: Utilized by "discovertasker-widget-modal-prompt" widget to trigger 'x_153465_discovert.Start_Process_Def' event.
sys_script_include.name: TaskTemplateHelpers
